message:
perf(ratelimit,store,mesh): hot-path optimizations for rate limiting, GC, and coverage tracking

- fcp-ratelimit/token_bucket: skip Mutex lock on refill when already
  at capacity (fast-path Acquire load)
- fcp-ratelimit/sliding_window: remove premature drop of lock guard
  before reading self.limit (lock is needed for the full scope)
- fcp-store/coverage: cache max_node_symbols with O(1) incremental
  update on add_symbol and lazy rescan only when max holder removed
- fcp-store/gc: zero-allocation root seeding via root_iter() instead
  of all_roots() HashSet allocation; add root_count() helper
- fcp-mesh/admission: document raw entry API optimization rationale

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
